title: Full-diagram grouping, travel, and split by destination
summary: Routing spreads across the full vertical extent into stacked regions. Groups form, travel together, and split when destinations diverge. Mixed colors nest by destination across the diagram.
visually_observable_good_behavior: Routing uses the full vertical extent of the center zone in stacked regions.
Strand groups form, travel together, and split when destinations diverge.
Mixed colors remain nested by destination rather than by source tube alone.
The full diagram reads as organized groups with clean peel-off transitions.

followed_requirements: Related fiber strands stay visually grouped until destinations diverge.
The routing engine spreads groups apart across the center routing zone.
Lane bands keep related strand lanes adjacent while preserving readable separation.
likely_followed_rules.why_this_image_passes: Groups travel together and split cleanly when destinations diverge.

followed_requirements: The routing engine uses the full available routing zone.
Routes spread strand groups apart instead of collapsing into one cluster.
likely_followed_rules.why_this_image_passes: The diagram uses vertical extent instead of compressing routes into the center.

notes: Full-diagram positive reference for group travel and destination-based splitting.
